title: CISA Catalog of Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (Demo Fixture)

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Log4j2 Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache Log4j2 contains a vulnerability where JNDI features do not protect against attacker-controlled JNDI references, leading to remote code execution.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Apply updates per vendor instructions. Block JNDI lookups via Java property until patched.
vulnerabilities.notes: Demo fixture — matches CMDB asset 'apache-log4j-app-01' for the Phase E KEV-match scenario.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows SmartScreen Security Feature Bypass
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Windows SmartScreen contains a security feature bypass that allows an attacker to evade SmartScreen protections.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions or discontinue use of the product.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Kernel TOCTOU Race Condition
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Windows Kernel contains a time-of-check time-of-use race condition that allows a local attacker to gain SYSTEM privileges.
